title: verbascum × prusianiforme
intro: Verbascum × prusianiforme, a hybrid species of the Verbascum genus, is a flowering plant that is often referred to as a type of mullein. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its leaves and flowers containing mucilage, a gel-like substance with anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × prusianiforme include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
